Description.SourceString:
Iron arrows are sturdy and sharp, capable of piercing most armour. Brynmoor soldiers regularly employed them in the war against the garou. 

Village blacksmiths toiled for weeks at a time, creating countless arrows to be slung into battle. They poured literal blood, sweat and tears into the cooling metal, each arrow containing a shard of their hate for the beastmen. 

The arrows were effective, brutally so. The arrows forged by blacksmiths who had lost loved ones to the conflict seemed to hit harder still. Vengeance manifested in metal.
